name: Wes 'n' Kathy's Authentic Original Lima Bean
recipeInstructions:
1. We invented this yesterday and are still munching on it.
2. I wanted a plain plate of butterbeans for my birthday, but Kathy can never do anything halfway.
3. Salt and black pepper to taste.
4. Place all ingredients except salt and pepper in a pot.
5. Bring to a boil, reduce heat.
6. Cover the pot and simmer until beans are very tender (3 to 4 hours).
7. Add salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve with bread, butter, garlic bread, or dinner rolls.
9. Makes a complete meal.
10. Enjoy!
